name.value: Nictiz Geboortezorg - Server - Scenario 2.1 - Serve Integrale Zwangerschapskaart resources of current pregnancy of Kim Zhanganak

description.value: Scenario 2.1: Serve Integrale Zwangerschapskaart resources of current pregnancy of Kim Zhanganak
Query Patient resource for HCIM Patient
Query Coverage resource for HCIM Payer
Query DeviceUseStatement resource for HCIM BladderFunction-UrineCatheter
Test Server query operation for MaternalRecord (EpisodeOfCare) including managing organization (Organization) and care manager (Practitioner)
Test Server query operation for Conditions (including Pregnancy)
Test Server query operation for Encounters
Test Server query operation for Observations
Test Server query operation for Observations
Test Server query operation for (Obstetric) Procedures
Test Server query operation for CareTeam
Test Server query operation for RelatedPerson
